name_en: 🔥Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag 👜Pebble seamlessly blends pure minimalist lines with a striking design style 💄creating a unique and innovative handbag design 🧸The iconic Anagram-engraved hardware serves both decoration and practicality 🎀Adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for various carrying methods 👛The unique twisted structure complements subtle details 👛This mini version is crafted from soft calfskin.😻Can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried by hand*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*Magnetic closure*Interior pocket*Synthetic leather lining* 🔥Anagram-engraved Pebble 🩵
name_cn:
🔥Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag 👜Pebble seamlessly blends pure minimalist lines with a striking design style 💄creating a unique and innovative handbag design 🧸The iconic Anagram-engraved hardware serves both decoration and practicality 🎀Adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for various carrying methods 👛The unique twisted structure complements subtle details 👛This mini version is crafted from soft calfskin.😻Can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried by hand*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*Magnetic closure*Interior pocket*Synthetic leather lining* 🔥Anagram-engraved Pebble 🩵
Style: 9047
Color: Baby Blue
Dimensions: 20CM~16CM~16CM
